From: Chartering - Ocean Reaper Maritime <chartering@ocean-reaper.com> 
Sent: 03 December 2025 07:49
To: Kavita Jantwal - Ocean Reaper Maritime <kavita.jantwal@ocean-reaper.com>
Subject: // FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : VEDANTA LTD OR NOM // IRON ORE, 55,000
+/- 10% MOLOO // MORMUGAAO - CHINA // LAYCAN : 10 : 14 DEC'25
 
Good Day !
 
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
 
//
Please submit all your bids by 14:00 hrs IST on 3rd December 2025..to
evaluate with validity of 24 hours. Any offer submission after the cut-off
time will not be considered.
 
*	Offer has to be submitted basis Mid China range along with
differential for North and South China
*	Auction will be conducted basis Mormugao WOB with no draft
restriction. 
 
ACCT : Vedanta Limited or nominee
CARGO : Iron Ore in bulk single grades -Fines in CHOPT 
QUANTITY : 55,000 +/- 10 pct moloo
LAYCAN : 10th December to 14th December 2025
LOAD PORT : 1 SP SA WOB Mormugao, WCI.
Alternatively
1 SP 1-2 SA Mormugao Berth 10/11 ,WCI ( draft 12.8 mts ) 
DISCHARGE PORT : 1-2 SP 1-2SB 1-2 SA China, CHOPT
LOAD RATE : Geared grabber ( WOB ): 10,000 tpwwdshinc (base)
Alternatively 
20,000 tpwwdshinc (base) for berth 10/11, Mormugao 
DISCHARGE RATE : 15,000 tpwwdshinc, 12 Hrs TT
 
1.25% ADDCOM. ON FDD + 1.25% BROKERAGE TO OCEAN REAPER MARITIME
 
Type of vessel: Geared
Age: Not exceeding 15 years
For freight and demurrage terms - refer enquiry terms.
All bids to have named vessels.
In case of any successful bidder not being able to perform as per the
finally agreed laycan or rates, compensation in the form of Lumpsum fee or
any contractual damage incurred by Charterers, whichever is higher shall be
charged from owners. 
 
//
Referring to the Announcement No. 54 of 2025 made by the Ministry of
Transport of the People's Republic of China on 10 October 2025, any
subsequent notices related thereto, and any enabling rules, regulations or
guidance issued by any agency of the People's Republic of China in
furtherance thereof, the captioned performing vessel belongs to following
scopes:
 
(i)            The Vessel is owned or bareboat chartered by a US
Corporation, other entity or individual;
(ii)           The Vessel is operated by a US Corporation, other entity or
individual;
(iii)          The Vessel is owned, bareboat chartered or operated by any
corporation or corporations or other entity or entities in which a 25% or
greater share of the equity (which shall include voting rights or board
membership), is directly or indirectly held by US Corporations, other
entities or individuals;
(iv)          The Vessel is built in the US; and/or
(v)           The Vessel is flagged in the US.
 
In this respect, please note, all customary port dues, levies, penalties,
fees, charges, and taxes arising at any port due to Vessels' flag, owners,
bareboat charterers, operators, registry, place of constructions, previous
port visits including but not limited to due to any connection which the
vessel may have with the United States of America shall be for the account
of the ship owners, and the ship owners to take all steps necessary to pay
such dues, charges and taxes in accordance with the applicable laws,
regulations and requirements. Any and all time lost, delays, detentions,
costs, losses, fines, damages, or expenses whatsoever arising from and/or in
connection with the above failures and/or changes shall be for the ship
owners account.
//
 
 Please note down the following points:
*	Quarantine requirements at each port prior to tendering of NOR to be
met. Any deviation to be at owners time and cost.
*	Owners to provide the vessel last 10 port calls, crew change list
for last 3 ports, PC & Health clearances from the last 2-3 ports.
*	Attached terms to be final and binding on the owners without any
deviation.
 
Please quote strictly as per the enquiry terms attached. 
//
 
KIND REGARDS,
Ms KAVITA JANTWAL
